children.text: provide for allocating the total amount allocated under sections 6705(a) and (b); and1

children.heading: .—Certification
children.label: b .—Certification
children.text: A variation by a State government under this section may apply only if the Secretary certifies that the variation complies with this section. The Secretary may certify a variation only if the Secretary is notified of the variation at least 30 days before the first payment period in which the variation applies.
